name: Princess Belle Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Give your princess-loving kid a fun bedtime companion with this Princess Belle Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Disney Collection by Pillowfort™. Made of PET fabric, this figural pillow buddy doll is designed as Belle in her iconic golden dress. It makes a fun pairing with other Disney princess dolls on their bed or desk and is sure to be their new favorite plush.
